Case Studies
Featured Work
01
Data Engineering
RevPipeline360 — Microsoft Fabric Lakehouse Build
Problem Revenue visibility is fragmented across disconnected sources — no single view of pipeline health, win rates, or forecast accuracy.
Solution A Bronze→Silver→Gold Fabric lakehouse with Direct Lake semantic model delivering a unified revenue intelligence layer — real-time, sub-second refresh.

End-to-end Fabric analytics pipeline — medallion architecture, PySpark notebook transforms, Direct Lake semantic model, and a Power BI Revenue Intelligence dashboard tracking 1,200 leads with 82% win rate.

Microsoft Fabric PySpark Direct Lake DAX Power BI Star Schema
View Case Study
02
PMO Analytics
PMO Performance & EVM Architecture
Problem Projects bleed margin silently — cost overruns are invisible until finance closes the books, too late to act.
Solution A governed EVM architecture across 30 projects surfacing CPI, SPI, EAC, and ETC in real time — cutting project expense 7% through early visibility.

Governed reference architecture for portfolio performance intelligence spanning BQE Core, Smartsheet, and Power BI. Built a 30-project EVM tracker with CPI/SPI/EAC/ETC metrics and executive dashboard.

Power BI Smartsheet BQE Core EVM DAX
View Case Study
03
Revenue Operations
Contract-to-Cash Lifecycle Architecture
Problem Signed contracts stall between teams — milestones go unbilled, invoices age, and cash sits uncollected while everyone assumes someone else is tracking it.
Solution A stage-gated C2C tracker enforcing billing milestones across Sales, Finance, and Operations — clearing $500K+ in payment backlog through automated routing and executive pipeline visibility.

Stage-gated C2C tracker integrating Salesforce and Smartsheet across Sales, Finance, and Operations. Cleared $500K+ in payment backlog through automated milestone tracking, role-based routing, and executive pipeline dashboards.

Salesforce Smartsheet Power BI Revenue Ops Stage Gates
View Case Study
04
Finance Operations
Bonus Accrual Architecture & Workday Mapping
Problem Incentive compensation is calculated manually and late — causing year-end P&L surprises and reconciliation chaos across HR, Finance, and operations.
Solution A Power Apps + Dataverse scoring engine with tier-based multiplier logic and a monthly Finance extract — eliminating year-end corrections entirely, fully mapped to Workday.

Incentive compensation platform built with Power Apps, Power Automate, and Dataverse. Composite productivity scoring engine (utilization × realization), tier-based multiplier logic, and monthly Finance reporting extract — eliminating year-end P&L corrections. Fully mapped to Workday HCM, Financials, and Adaptive Planning.

Power Apps Power Automate Dataverse Workday HCM Adaptive Planning BQE Core Power BI
View Case Study
💼
Finance Operations
05
Web Application  ·  Industrial Services
CAO Bid Portfolio — Industrial Bid Intelligence Engine
Problem Industrial services firms win the wrong contracts — chasing bids on gut feel, underpricing risk, and discovering margin problems only after mobilisation.
Solution A React bid intelligence engine enforcing 15 Go/No-Go rules across adjusted margin, commodity sensitivity, pursuit ROI, and capacity — before a bid goes out the door.

React 18 SPA with a two-layer contract economics engine purpose-built for industrial services outsourcing. Evaluates bid viability across 15 deterministic Go/No-Go rules — incorporating adjusted margin, byproduct commodity sensitivity, pursuit cost ROI, site audit gate, and capacity concurrency monitoring.

React 18 Azure MSAL Microsoft Graph API OneDrive Excel Go/No-Go Engine Contract Economics GitHub Pages
View Case Study
🏭
Industrial Services
06
Data Architecture  ·  Revenue Operations
CRM Revenue Lifecycle Architecture — HubSpot Deal-to-Cash
Problem Revenue data lives in silos — CRM, finance, and operations each tell a different story with no shared lineage from deal to cash.
Solution An enterprise data architecture propagating a single deal_id from commercial close through contract, delivery, billing, and cash — with a 35-KPI catalog and full warehouse governance.

Enterprise-grade data architecture connecting HubSpot CRM commercial pipeline to operational delivery, billing, and profitability analytics. Full revenue lineage from deal_id through contract, asset, invoice, cost, and margin — star schema with 4 grain-declared fact tables, 7 SCD-typed dimensions, and complete warehouse governance documentation.

HubSpot CRM Star Schema SCD Type 2 Revenue Lineage SQL Contract-to-Cash KPI Catalog Asset Lifecycle
View Case Study

About Me

Data Analyst and BI professional based in Chicago with 6+ years of experience in analytics, revenue operations, and cross-functional delivery. I build systems that turn operational data into actionable intelligence.

My work spans the full analytics stack — from lakehouse architecture and ETL pipelines to governance workflows, executive dashboards, and business process automation.
